error.details: OPTIONAL OBJECT (structured; sensitive values must be redacted)

rules: code MUST be one of the codes in this document
code values are stable, uppercase, snake-case strings
message is English; UI MAY translate locally
details is optional and structured; sensitive values MUST be redacted
HTTP status codes are listed alongside each code; backend MUST use the listed status

auditMapping.rule: When backend emits an error response that should also produce an AuditEvent, it writes result=FAILURE and metadata.errorCode=<code>

codes.meaning: Request body or query parameters failed Zod validation.
No valid session or token.
Authenticated but not allowed (includes CSRF token mismatch).
Requested resource does not exist or is not visible to the caller.
State conflict (duplicate resource, idempotency violation).
Reserved for future EE/Cloud editions.
Unexpected server error. Use sparingly; prefer specific codes.
Backend cannot reach a critical dependency (e.g. database).
Fallback for non-500 request errors when no more specific code is available.
Static UI asset was not found while serving the SPA/static bundle.
Username or password invalid (do not reveal which).
Session cookie present but expired.
Session cookie tampered with or session not found.
X-CSRF-Token header missing or does not match server-side session token.
X-CSRF-Token header missing or does not match server-side session token. Implementation alias for CSRF_TOKEN_MISMATCH.
Token does not exist or hash does not match.
Token past expiresAt.
Token already consumed.
Token revoked by admin.
Authorization: Bearer header missing or hash mismatch.
Agent token has been revoked.
Agent token past expiresAt.
Requested registration token does not exist or is not visible to the caller.
Registration token can only be deleted after it is expired or revoked.
agentId does not exist.
Agent is DISABLED.
Agent is REVOKED.
An Agent with this code already exists in the workspace.
Path agentId does not match the Agent that owns the token.
Agent exists but cannot currently accept commands for the requested service/action.
Agent has not sent a heartbeat or command poll yet.
Agent heartbeat/poll timestamp is older than the configured stale threshold.
serviceId does not exist.
Service exists but does not belong to the calling Agent.
Manifest validation failed (missing required fields, etc.).
Service code conflict in workspace.
Action name not declared on the service manifest.
ActionDefinition.enabled = false.
Payload failed inputSchema validation.
Confirmation flag missing for an action with requiresConfirmation = true.
commandId does not exist.
Command exists but is not assigned to the calling Agent.
Result reported for a Command already in a terminal state.
Command past expiresAt and cannot be reported.
Attempted a CommandStatus transition that is not allowed.
Action prepare command timed out while waiting for Agent response.
Agent returned a failed result for an ACTION_PREPARE command.
Result was reported for a Command that already has a stored result or terminal status.
Requested Command cannot be retried from its current state.
Serialized CommandResult message/data/error exceeded OPSTAGE_COMMAND_RESULT_MAX_BYTES.
Config key does not exist for the service.
CE v0.1 does not support config editing — reserved for EE/Cloud.
A user with the requested username already exists.
Requested user does not exist or is not visible to the caller.
Operation would remove or demote the last active owner.
Backend cannot reach SQLite database.
Required environment variable missing — surfaced only via startup logs.
